scripts.build:ios: vite build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.android:init: npx cap add android && node scripts/setup-android.cjs
scripts.android:build: vite build && cp dist/android.html dist/index.html && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:dev: npm run android:build && npx cap open android
scripts.pico8:all: node pico8/tools/seed-spritesheet.mjs && node pico8/tools/sync-sprites.mjs && node pico8/tools/build-cart.mjs
